name: peckish
description: Order food on DoorDash from Claude — you approve every order.
long_description:
Peckish gives Claude real DoorDash ordering: it searches stores, compares true fee-included totals from live quotes, builds carts, scans promos, and handles groceries, pickup, scheduled delivery, reorders and spend questions.

Placing an order always requires an approval dialog you answer yourself — Claude must first show the itemized quote, confirm the Dasher tip, and name the card being charged. Submission never auto-retries, and every tool call and confirmation is logged to ~/.peckish/logs/.

Requires a Mac with Apple Silicon and DoorDash's dd-cli (waitlist-gated), signed in via `dd-cli login`. No Anthropic API key needed — your Claude subscription powers the model.

dd_cli_path.title: dd-cli location (optional)
dd_cli_path.description: Leave blank if dd-cli is at ~/.local/bin/dd-cli. Set it if you installed the DoorDash CLI somewhere else — desktop apps don't inherit your shell PATH.

tools.name: get_session_context
tools.description: Load the user's ordering context: default delivery address, saved dietary/budget preferences, and current local time.

tools.name: list_addresses
tools.description: List the user's saved DoorDash delivery addresses (label, printable address, default flag).

tools.name: set_default_address
tools.description: Change the ACCOUNT-WIDE default delivery address (persists across app/web).

tools.name: search_restaurants
tools.description: Search nearby restaurants by free-text query.

tools.name: get_menu
tools.description: Fetch a restaurant's menu: returns menu_id (needed for cart adds and item details), store_is_open, and item…

tools.name: get_restaurant_item_details
tools.description: Full details for one restaurant menu item: price, description, and extras[] customization groups (each with…

tools.name: get_store_details
tools.description: Store business metadata incl.

tools.name: list_carts
tools.description: List the user's open (unsubmitted) carts: cart_uuid, store, items, timestamps (epoch ms).

tools.name: add_items_to_cart
tools.description: Add items to a cart (creates one if no cart_uuid passed and none open at the store).

tools.name: show_cart
tools.description: Show cart contents (no pricing — use preview_order for that).

tools.name: remove_cart_item
tools.description: Remove one line item from a cart.

tools.name: delete_cart
tools.description: Empty a cart and abandon it (cart_uuid becomes invalid).

tools.name: preview_order
tools.description: Authoritative pricing + logistics for a cart (read-only, no charge): display_summary (show VERBATIM to the…

tools.name: submit_order
tools.description: Place the order — charges the user's real payment method.

tools.name: get_checkout_url
tools.description: Browser checkout URL for a cart — FALLBACK ONLY, for edits the CLI can't make: swap payment method, opt out…

tools.name: get_order_history
tools.description: Past orders (default 50 orders / 90 days, max 100 / 365): store, items, total, order_uuid, is_reorderable,…

tools.name: reorder
tools.description: Create a NEW cart from a past order.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Check whether a submitted order went through: successful | pending (check again) | action_required (user mu…

tools.name: get_receipt
tools.description: Itemized receipt for one past order (subtotal, fees, tax, tip, total, card last4).

tools.name: list_payment_methods
tools.description: Saved cards + which is default.

tools.name: list_promos
tools.description: Campaign promos eligible at a store for this user (may be empty — that's normal).

tools.name: apply_promo
tools.description: Apply a promo to a cart.

tools.name: remove_promo
tools.description: Remove an applied promo (pass the same ids used at apply).

tools.name: find_stores
tools.description: Discover NON-restaurant stores near the default address (16-mile radius): grocery (default), alcohol, conve…

tools.name: find_items
tools.description: Search items inside ONE retail/grocery store by name — returns item_ids for cart adds, keyed per query.

tools.name: get_grocery_item_details
tools.description: Details for a retail/grocery item (pricing, options) + menu_id fallback source for grocery cart adds.

tools.name: build_grocery_list
tools.description: Resolve a grocery/pantry list to real products at one store (raw ingredients only — NOT restaurant food).

tools.name: save_preference
tools.description: Persist a durable user preference across sessions (dietary rule, allergy, budget habit, tip default).

tools.name: remove_preference
tools.description: Delete a saved preference note (exact text match).
